appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to reflect the resolved continuation status-line rule: the displayed denominator counts active items (`completed + remaining`), so cancelled todos are excluded from the shown total.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a worker-context fallback when the procedure requires a local commit but commit approval is unavailable, so workers can hand off cleanly without marking the procedure as violated.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun review for fix-deferred-callback-cleanup traced the only procedure deviation to the mandatory Step 8 commit requirement in the skill versus a worker session that could not complete that approval step.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Warn workers that `npm run check` may rewrite unrelated tracked files and instruct them to restore out-of-scope formatter-only diffs before staging or handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun review for fix-prompt-builder-edge-cases found repeated restore steps after validation because Biome reformatted unrelated tracked files during `npm run check`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the continuation prompt status-line documentation to match the implemented active-total rule (`displayed total = completed + remaining`) now that cancelled todos are intentionally excluded from the shown denominator.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun prompt-builder review found that features.json and validation-contract.md still describe `Y = todos.length` while the fixed implementation and tests now use an active-total denominator to preserve coherent arithmetic when cancelled todos are present.
